testcase.name: test_create_user
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_users_whatsapp.py:126: in test_create_user assert response.status_code == 201, f"Failed to create user: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create user: {"id":"974be702-bbd1-4380-8e3f-a16b62dbf865","email":"test_create_user@example.com","name":"TEST_User_Create","role":"staff","permissions":{"doctors":true,"medicals":true,"agencies":false,"items":true,"orders":true,"expenses":false,"reminders":true,"pending_items":false,"email_logs":false,"whatsapp_logs":false,"users":false,"smtp_settings":false,"company_settings":false,"whatsapp_settings":false},"created_at":"2026-02-05T16:21:28.735775+00:00"} E assert 200 == 201 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_user
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_users_whatsapp.py:170: in test_update_user assert create_resp.status_code == 201 E assert 200 == 201 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_delete_user
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_users_whatsapp.py:229: in test_delete_user assert create_resp.status_code == 201 E assert 200 == 201 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
